name: Wellness Collage Hero
prompt_context: A premium, calming hero section for a wellness or mental health platform. Features a centered headline, descriptive text, and a heart-shaped or artistic collage of 8 images. The tone is empathetic, professional, and tranquil.

content_schema.eyebrow: string (Short phrase above title, max 3 words, e.g. 'Your journey starts here')
content_schema.description: string (Subtext providing more context, max 25 words)
content_schema.images: array of 8 strings (Unsplash URLs or image paths representing peace, therapy, and mindfulness)

image_hints: Select 8 images that show diverse people in states of mindfulness, therapy, or peaceful reflection. High quality, natural lighting.
